display_text: Arcanist's Armor, Cost: 0: Tier 5 neutral item. Passively grants +4 armor and +8% magic resistance to all allies within a 1200 radius. Active ability 'Mega Shield' provides 25% damage reflection for 5 seconds. A powerful defensive aura for team-wide survivability in late-game sieges and high-ground defenses. Stats: CD: 35s, Duration: 5s, Aura Radius: 1200.
